title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 30th April 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Hold, no rush to add; range-bound till numbers improve
recommendations.detail: Recovered from ~450 to ~660. Needs the flat March-quarter performance to improve in the June-ending quarter for a jump; otherwise range-bound roughly 600-700, with real strength only above 700. No need to buy aggressively here.

recommendations.note: Avoid temporarily until results; APM gas/margin hit
recommendations.detail: The gas-supply crisis has cut APM gas availability, and APM distribution margins are clearly showing signs of being affected. The stock is near its 52-week low (~165). He would avoid it temporarily until the result; there is no hurry.

recommendations.note: Buy after today's result, especially on a dip; portfolio stock
recommendations.detail: Trading ~1,106 vs an all-time high of 1,144. 'Buy on rumours, sell on news' means some profit-booking is possible, but he is not expecting a bad result; rising capex (new Vizag/Nektar project) will weigh on net profit. He calls it a portfolio stock that could rise another 50-60% in 8 months on a one-year view; buy after the result, and buy more if it falls.

recommendations.note: Hold; only listed AI play; buy fresh only in small tranches
recommendations.detail: The only AI play visible in the listed space, recently listed with no chart history. He says give it time as AI is talked of worldwide; if you hold it, hold, and if buying fresh, buy little by little rather than all at once.

recommendations.note: Hold for dividend then exit on a 5-10% rally
recommendations.detail: For a caller ~15% down with a 6-month view, he says hold for the dividend and exit on a small rally. Canara Bank historically rises ~10% post ex-dividend; with ~3% dividend yield, the stock still needs ~12% to recover the 15% loss.

recommendations.note: Hold for the upcoming dividend, then exit on a 5-10% rally
recommendations.detail: SBI has a dividend coming. After the record/ex-dividend dates, exit on a 5-10% rally; until then hold to collect the dividend, with capital appreciation expected.

recommendations.note: Hold for dividend, then exit and move to safer bets
recommendations.detail: Infosys has a dividend coming. Hold until the dividend, then exit on a small rally; specifically on Infosys he says get out when it comes back and move toward somewhat safer bets.

recommendations.note: Own/Hold; acquisition commentary is key; trim near 330-340
recommendations.detail: Results are awaited and he expects decent numbers, but the main commentary on how the acquisition plays out is key. Last quarter turnover and profits fell, so the stock dropped sharply (400+ to below 300, down to ~230). Recovery depends on the commentary; since it has already jumped short-term, reduce partially if selling returns near 330-340.

recommendations.note: Hold; good large-cap, will jump medium-to-long term
recommendations.detail: A good large-cap, not a bad stock. The market may correct a bit short-term, but in the medium-to-long term it will jump; hold.

recommendations.note: Hold; large-cap, will jump medium-to-long term
recommendations.detail: Grouped as a good large-cap to hold. Note he flags banks broadly weak as RBI forward-booking provisioning reflects negatively, with no Bank Nifty stock positive today, but his verdict on the basket is hold.

recommendations.note: Hold; good large-cap, will jump medium-to-long term
recommendations.detail: A good large-cap, not a bad stock; short-term market may correct but medium-to-long term it will jump; hold.

recommendations.note: Hold; good large-cap, will jump medium-to-long term
recommendations.detail: A good large-cap, not a bad stock; short-term market may correct but medium-to-long term it will jump; hold.

recommendations.note: Hold; good large-cap, will jump medium-to-long term
recommendations.detail: A good large-cap, not a bad stock; short-term market may correct but medium-to-long term it will jump; hold.

recommendations.note: Hold; no fresh buying; broking stocks range-bound
recommendations.detail: Broking and financial-services stocks may stay range-bound, with clear signs of post-rally profit-booking. He would not advise fresh buying; if already bought, hold.

The result disappointed and the stock trades near its 52-week low. It's a decent niche/specialised-products company, newly approved for hydrogen cylinders for trucks and trailers. If hydrogen acceptance comes, a strong recovery (like Shaily Engineering Plastics) is possible from ~160-170, depending on product acceptance.

recommendations.price: buy only on sharp post-ex-dividend fall
recommendations.note: Don't average; banks bearish; add only on a sharp fall
recommendations.detail: He says no to averaging. All banks show RBI-induced bearishness. The stock made a new high above 200 then corrected ~20%; dividend ~2% max won't move the needle. Buy only on a sharp post-ex-dividend fall, after checking for appreciation potential.

recommendations.note: Exit on the recovery rally after this quarter's results
recommendations.detail: Will recover from the recent fall. After this quarter's results, when a rally comes (perhaps ~40% recovery), take the capital out and exit.

recommendations.note: Exit on the recovery rally after this quarter's results
recommendations.detail: Will recover from the recent fall. Look at this quarter's results and exit when a rally comes; take the capital out and exit.

recommendations.note: Exit on the recovery rally after this quarter's results
recommendations.detail: Will recover from the recent fall. After this quarter's results, exit on the rally and take the capital out.
